Rules.InvariantScript: "This test suite verifies the normal civilian emergency request workflow from role selection to the confirmation screen, including GPS location display. Final incident type selection and submission are supported by manual evidence due to the Test Studio dropdown limitation."

"This test case checks that a civilian can select the Civilian role, open the emergency request flow, reach the confirmation screen, and view captured GPS coordinates. The final incident type selection and Confirm action are verified manually because Test Studio does not reliably replay the dropdown control."

"[{""Description"":""Select Civilian role"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":""13""},{""Description"":""Tap SEND HELP"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":""23""},{""Description"":""Verify confirmation screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":""54""},{""Description"":""Verify location is shown"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":""54""}]"
"TS2 - Civilian request validation and missing input"
"This test suite verifies that the civilian request flow prevents incomplete emergency submissions by requiring an incident type before the request can be confirmed."
"TC2 - Prevent submission when required information is missing"

"This test case checks that when a civilian reaches the confirmation screen without selecting an incident type, the app does not allow the emergency request to be submitted. The Confirm button should remain disabled and the user should stay on the confirmation screen."

"[{""Description"":""Select civilian role"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Tap SEND HELP"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify confirmation screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify Confirm button is disabled before incident type is selected"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":null}]"

"This test suite verifies that the responder sign-up pathway can be reached from the responder role. The final form entry and account creation are verified manually because Test Studio did not reliably set values in the sign-up text input controls."

"This test case checks that a responder can open the sign-up page from the responder role selection flow. The sign-up form completion and successful account creation are supported by manual evidence due to a Test Studio input-control limitation."

"[{""Description"":""Open responder login screen"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Open responder sign-up page"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":""4""},{""Description"":""Verify sign-up screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":""93""}]"

"This test suite verifies the normal responder login workflow using a valid responder account. It checks that the responder login screen can be opened from the role selection screen, and the remaining login steps are supported with manual evidence because Test Studio could not reliably replay the login input fields."

"This test case checks that a responder can access the login screen and log in using a valid responder account. Test Studio verifies the stable navigation part of the flow, while the credential entry and successful login are verified manually due to input-field replay limitations."
"[{""Description"":""Open responder login screen"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify responder login screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":null}]"

"This test suite verifies responder login error handling. It checks that the responder login screen is accessible and that invalid responder credentials are rejected. The invalid credential entry is verified with manual evidence because Test Studio could not reliably replay the login input fields."

"This test case checks that an invalid responder username or password does not allow access to the responder workflow. Test Studio verifies that the responder login screen opens correctly, while the invalid credential attempt is verified manually due to Test Studio input-field replay limitations."
"[{""Description"":""Open responder login screen"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify responder login screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":null}]"
"TS6 - Incident overview queue filtering and sorting"

"This test suite verifies the responder incident overview queue. It checks that the incident overview screen can be opened and that the queue displays active incident records for responder action, while completed or removed incidents are not shown in the active queue."
"TC6 - Show active incidents in the incident overview queue"

"This test case checks that the responder incident overview screen opens correctly and displays active incident records that require responder attention. It also checks that completed or false-report records are excluded from the active queue."

"[{""Description"":""Open incident overview screen"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify incident overview screen is visible"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify incident queue is visible"",""Rule"":""Step6"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify active queue contains records"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify Done reports are not displayed"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify False Report records are not displayed"",""Rule"":""Step5"",""ScreenId"":null}]"
"This test suite verifies that a responder can open a New incident, accept the dispatch request, and move into the dispatch tracking workflow."
"TC7 - Accept new incident and move to tracking"

"This test case checks that a New incident can be opened by the responder, accepted, and moved into the dispatch tracking flow. Since Test Studio does not reliably select a repeated View button inside a gallery, the test sets a New incident as the selected incident before opening the incident detail screen."

"[{""Description"":""Open incident overview screen"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":""13""},{""Description"":""Verify incident overview screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":""79""},{""Description"":""Select a New incident for testing"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify a New incident was found"",""Rule"":""Step5"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Open active incident detail screen"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify active incident screen opens"",""Rule"":""Step6"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Accept dispatch request"",""Rule"":""Step7"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify dispatch tracking screen opens"",""Rule"":""Step8"",""ScreenId"":null}]"

"This test suite verifies the additional support request path for responders. It checks that a responder can request extra support for an active incident, move into the tracking screen, and see a clear support warning without breaking the incident status."
"TC8 - Request additional support and show tracking warning"
"This test case checks that when a responder requests additional support, the app opens the dispatch tracking screen, displays the support warning, and keeps the incident in the On the Way state."

"[{""Description"":""Open incident overview screen"",""Rule"":""Step5"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify incident overview screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step6"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Select a New incident for support request testing"",""Rule"":""Step7"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify a New incident was found"",""Rule"":""Step8"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Open active incident detail screen"",""Rule"":""Step9"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify active incident screen opens"",""Rule"":""Step10"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Request additional support"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify dispatch tracking screen opens"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify support warning is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify incident status is On the Way"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":null}]"
"TS9 - On the Way incident direct tracking flow"
"This test suite verifies the shortcut navigation for incidents that are already being handled."
"TC9 - Open On the Way incident directly in tracking screen"

"This test case checks that when a responder selects View on an incident whose status is already On the Way, the app navigates directly to the Dispatch Tracking screen instead of showing the Accept / Dispatch decision screen again."

"[{""Description"":""Open incident overview screen"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify incident overview screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":""79""},{""Description"":""Select an On the Way incident for testing"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify an On the Way incident was found"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Open dispatch tracking screen directly"",""Rule"":""Step5"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify dispatch tracking screen opens directly"",""Rule"":""Step6"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify incident status information is shown"",""Rule"":""Step7"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify selected incident is On the Way"",""Rule"":""Step8"",""ScreenId"":null}]"

Set(
    varSelectedIncident,
    First(Filter(EmergencyIncidents, Status.Value = "On the Way"))
)
"This test suite verifies the responder workflow for reviewing verification information and manually flagging a suspicious incident as a false report."
"This test case checks that a responder can open a New incident, view the verification information, and flag the incident as a False Report when the report appears suspicious."

"[{""Description"":""Open incident overview screen"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify incident overview screen is displayed"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":""107""},{""Description"":""Select a New incident for false report test"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify a New incident was found"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Open active incident detail screen"",""Rule"":""Step5"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify active incident screen opens"",""Rule"":""Step6"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify verification information is visible"",""Rule"":""Step7"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify false report button is available"",""Rule"":""Step8"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Flag incident as false report"",""Rule"":""Step9"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify app returns to incident overview"",""Rule"":""Step10"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Refresh incident data source"",""Rule"":""Step11"",""ScreenId"":""79""},{""Description"":""Verify flagged incident is removed from active queue"",""Rule"":""Step12"",""ScreenId"":""79""}]"
"This test suite verifies that a responder can complete an active dispatch and that the completed incident is removed from the active incident queue."
"TC11 - Mark incident as Done and remove it from active queue"
"This test case checks that an On the Way incident can be opened in the dispatch tracking screen, marked as Done by the responder, and removed from the active incident overview queue."

"[{""Description"":""Refresh incident data source"",""Rule"":""Step1"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Select an On the Way incident for testing"",""Rule"":""Step2"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify an On the Way incident exists"",""Rule"":""Step3"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Open dispatch tracking screen"",""Rule"":""Step4"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify dispatch tracking screen opens"",""Rule"":""Step5"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify selected incident is On the Way"",""Rule"":""Step6"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify Mark as Done button is available"",""Rule"":""Step7"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Mark incident as completed"",""Rule"":""Step8"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify app returns to incident overview"",""Rule"":""Step9"",""ScreenId"":null},{""Description"":""Verify completed incident is removed from active queue"",""Rule"":""Step10"",""ScreenId"":null}]"
